title: Design System: TTF Font Merge Console

display.purpose: Product title and font specimen preview only.

body.purpose: Controls, labels, metadata, and repeated task UI.

shadows.name: panel-ambient
shadows.purpose: Main panel separation from the workbench background.

shadows.name: interactive-lift
shadows.purpose: Short hover feedback for interactive controls.

motion.name: state-quick
motion.purpose: Default hover and state transition for controls.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid #d4522f; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0 16px; background: #d4522f; color: #fff; font: 900 14px/1.2 'Avenir Next', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, background 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(22, 22, 22, 0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(18, 108, 104, 0.26); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height: 44px; border: 1px solid #161616; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0 16px; background: #161616; color: #fff; font: 900 14px/1.2 'Avenir Next', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(22, 22, 22, 0.12); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(18, 108, 104, 0.26); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Field Block
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid #d6dad5; border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; background: #f0f3ee; color: #161616; } .ds-field span { color: #a9331d; font: 900 12px/1.2 'Avenir Next', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-field select { min-height: 42px; border: 1px solid #c8cec8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 0 12px; background: #fbfcf8; color: #161616; } .ds-field select:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(18, 108, 104, 0.16); border-color: #126c68; }

components.name: Panel
components.html:
选择字体

源字体与目标字体保持分区清晰。
components.css: .ds-panel { border: 1px solid #d6dad5; border-radius: 8px; padding: 18px; background: #fff; color: #161616; box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(21, 25, 23, 0.12); } .ds-panel h2 { margin: 0 0 8px; font: 700 22px/1.2 'Avenir Next', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; } .ds-panel p { margin: 0; color: #6b6f72; font: 400 14px/1.55 'Avenir Next', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; }

components.name: Status Pill
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 34px; border: 1px solid #d6dad5; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0 13px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); color: #126c68; font: 800 13px/1.2 'Avenir Next', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif; }

narrative.overview: A compact, tactile, technically trustworthy local tool for designers and frontend engineers who need to merge Chinese TTF font characters without losing confidence in the file workflow.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained warm-neutral surfaces with rust and teal functional accents
Terminal logs as a confidence surface

rules.name: The Functional Accent Rule
rules.body: Rust and teal exist for action and state, not decoration.

rules.name: The Display Restraint Rule
rules.body: Use WorkbenchTitle only for the product title or font previews.

dos: Do preserve keyboard focus and state feedback.
donts: Don't make it look like a generic enterprise backend system.
Don't use dark-mode terminal cosplay as the default identity.
